---
title: "Publication-Quality Figures — APOE Isoform CRC Analysis"
author: "Ghani"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
    fig_width: 8
    fig_height: 6
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo       = TRUE,
  warning    = FALSE,
  message    = FALSE,
  fig.align  = "center",
  dpi        = 300
)

library(yaml)
params <- read_yaml("../config/params.yaml")

# Output directory for figures
fig_dir <- "../results/figures/"
if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
```

# 0. Global Theme & Palette

```{r global-theme}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(survminer)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)

# Isoform color palette from params.yaml
iso_colors <- c(
  "e2" = params$figures$color_palette$e2,
  "e3" = params$figures$color_palette$e3,
  "e4" = params$figures$color_palette$e4
)

# Publication theme
theme_pub <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40"),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = NA),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

theme_set(theme_pub)
```

---

# 1. Load Processed Data

```{r load-data}
clinical  <- read_csv(file.path(params$paths$processed_data, "clinical_with_isoforms.csv"))
expr      <- read_csv(file.path(params$paths$processed_data, "expression_normalized.csv"))
immune    <- read_csv(file.path(params$paths$processed_data, "immune_infiltration.csv"))
mutations <- read_csv(file.path(params$paths$processed_data, "mutation_summary.csv"))
deg       <- read_csv(file.path(params$paths$results_tables, "deg_results.csv"))
gsea      <- read_csv(file.path(params$paths$results_tables, "gsea_results.csv"))
```

---

# 2. Figure 1 — APOE Isoform Distribution

```{r fig1-isoform-dist, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
fig1 <- clinical %>%
  count(apoe_isoform) %>%
  mutate(
    pct   = n / sum(n) * 100,
    label = sprintf("%d\n(%.1f%%)", n, pct)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(apoe_isoform, -n), y = n, fill = apoe_isoform)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.3, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = iso_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title = "APOE Isoform Distribution in TCGA CRC",
    x     = "APOE Isoform Group",
    y     = "Number of Patients"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

fig1
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig1_isoform_distribution.pdf"), fig1, width = 6, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig1_isoform_distribution.png"), fig1, width = 6, height = 5)
```

---

# 3. Figure 2 — Volcano Plot (DEGs)

```{r fig2-volcano, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
fig2 <- deg %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      padj < params$deg_thresholds$padj & log2FoldChange >  params$deg_thresholds$log2fc ~ "Up",
      padj < params$deg_thresholds$padj & log2FoldChange < -params$deg_thresholds$log2fc ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = significance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-params$deg_thresholds$log2fc, params$deg_thresholds$log2fc),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(params$deg_thresholds$padj),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Up" = "#E74C3C", "Down" = "#3498DB", "NS" = "grey80"),
    name   = "Regulation"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Differential Gene Expression by APOE Isoform",
    x     = expression(log[2]~"Fold Change"),
    y     = expression(-log[10]~"adjusted p-value")
  )

fig2
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig2_volcano_plot.pdf"), fig2, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig2_volcano_plot.png"), fig2, width = 8, height = 6)
```

---

# 4. Figure 3 — Immune Infiltration Boxplots

```{r fig3-immune, fig.width=10, fig.height=7}
immune_long <- immune %>%
  left_join(clinical %>% select(sample_id, apoe_isoform), by = "sample_id") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = -c(sample_id, apoe_isoform),
    names_to  = "cell_type",
    values_to = "fraction"
  ) %>%
  filter(cell_type %in% params$immune$cell_types)

fig3 <- ggboxplot(
  immune_long,
  x       = "apoe_isoform",
  y       = "fraction",
  fill    = "apoe_isoform",
  palette = iso_colors,
  facet.by = "cell_type",
  scales   = "free_y",
  add      = "jitter",
  add.params = list(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8)
) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label = "p.format", size = 3.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Immune Cell Infiltration by APOE Isoform",
    x     = "APOE Isoform",
    y     = "Estimated Fraction"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

fig3
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig3_immune_infiltration.pdf"), fig3, width = 10, height = 7)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig3_immune_infiltration.png"), fig3, width = 10, height = 7)
```

---

# 5. Figure 4 — TMB by Isoform

```{r fig4-tmb, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
fig4 <- mutations %>%
  left_join(clinical %>% select(sample_id, apoe_isoform), by = "sample_id") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = apoe_isoform, y = tmb, fill = apoe_isoform)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = iso_colors) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y.npc = 0.95) +
  labs(
    title = "Tumor Mutational Burden by APOE Isoform",
    x     = "APOE Isoform",
    y     = "TMB (mutations / Mb, log scale)"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

fig4
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig4_tmb_violin.pdf"), fig4, width = 6, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig4_tmb_violin.png"), fig4, width = 6, height = 5)
```

---

# 6. Figure 5 — Pathway Enrichment Dot Plot

```{r fig5-gsea, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
fig5 <- gsea %>%
  filter(padj < params$pathway$fdr_threshold) %>%
  mutate(pathway = fct_reorder(pathway, NES)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = NES, y = pathway, size = -log10(padj), color = NES)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low  = "#3498DB",
    mid  = "grey90",
    high = "#E74C3C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = expression(-log[10]~"FDR"), range = c(2, 8)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment (GSEA)",
    x     = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
    y     = NULL
  )

fig5
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig5_gsea_dotplot.pdf"), fig5, width = 9, height = 7)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig5_gsea_dotplot.png"), fig5, width = 9, height = 7)
```

---

# 7. Figure 6 — Kaplan-Meier Survival Curves

```{r fig6-km-os, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
fit_os <- survfit(Surv(OS.time, OS) ~ apoe_isoform, data = clinical)

fig6 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_os,
  data          = clinical,
  pval          = TRUE,
  pval.method   = TRUE,
  risk.table    = TRUE,
  risk.table.height = 0.25,
  palette       = iso_colors,
  linetype      = "solid",
  surv.median.line = "hv",
  xlab          = "Time (days)",
  ylab          = "Overall Survival Probability",
  title         = "Overall Survival by APOE Isoform",
  legend.title  = "APOE Isoform",
  ggtheme       = theme_pub
)

fig6
pdf(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig6_km_os.pdf"), width = 8, height = 6)
print(fig6)
dev.off()
png(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig6_km_os.png"), width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
print(fig6)
dev.off()
```

---

# 8. Figure 7 — Kaplan-Meier (DFS)

```{r fig7-km-dfs, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
fit_dfs <- survfit(Surv(DFS.time, DFS) ~ apoe_isoform, data = clinical)

fig7 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_dfs,
  data          = clinical,
  pval          = TRUE,
  pval.method   = TRUE,
  risk.table    = TRUE,
  risk.table.height = 0.25,
  palette       = iso_colors,
  xlab          = "Time (days)",
  ylab          = "Disease-Free Survival Probability",
  title         = "Disease-Free Survival by APOE Isoform",
  legend.title  = "APOE Isoform",
  ggtheme       = theme_pub
)

fig7
pdf(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig7_km_dfs.pdf"), width = 8, height = 6)
print(fig7)
dev.off()
png(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig7_km_dfs.png"), width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
print(fig7)
dev.off()
```

---

# 9. Composite Panel (Figures 1 + 4 + 6)

```{r fig-composite, fig.width=14, fig.height=5}
composite <- fig1 + fig4 + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
composite
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig_composite_panel.pdf"), composite, width = 14, height = 5)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig_composite_panel.png"), composite, width = 14, height = 5)
```

---

# 10. Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
